div.h1: Provided Buffer Ring for TCP Receive

p.strong: Memory Scaling: Kernel-managed buffer selection vs Static pre-allocation

g.text: Shared Buffer Pool (Physical RAM) | Total: 2MB (256 x 8KB Pages)

p.em: Provided Buffer Rings allow handling 100k+ concurrent sockets with only a few MB of buffer memory.

ol.li: Packet Arrival: NIC DMA's data to kernel sk_buff.
Group Lookup: Finds bgid=1 ring descriptor.

Buffer Selection:
Reads ring->tail (volatile).
Selects io_uring_buf at index (head & mask).
Note: Kernel maintains internal head.
Data Copy: Kernel copies from sk_buff to buf.addr.
